message:
feat(conformance): add PE/staging differential oracle, metamorphic, and adversarial tests (bd-3dl.14.6)

20 integration tests in fj-conformance covering:
- 5 differential oracle comparison points (PE split, constant folding,
  residual shape, DCE correctness, staging pipeline equivalence)
- 3 metamorphic properties (all-known==full-eval, no-known==identity,
  determinism 100x/50x)
- 8 adversarial edge cases (mask mismatch, nothing-foldable, 1000-eqn
  chain, identity jaxpr, empty jaxpr, large DCE, error propagation,
  well-formedness)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
